src/main/java/com/test/catalog/infrastru._comment: A repository method returning a projection is materialized via a JPQL constructor expression (SELECT new <FQN>(...)) — Spring Data cannot auto-project an entity onto a record DTO. The JPA method return type stays the projection record; properties map in declaration order to entity columns. Entity-returning methods on the same repo are unchanged.
contains: SELECT new com.test.catalog.application.dtos.ProductPriceValidation(p.id, p.status) FROM ProductJpa p WHERE p.id IN :productIds
SELECT p FROM ProductJpa p WHERE p.id IN :productIds

src/main/java/com/test/catalog/infrastru._comment: The impl returns the JPA result directly for projection returns (no entity->domain mapping); the constructor expression already produced the record.
